summary_sections.title: Key Concepts: Converting Polar & Rectangular Coordinates
summary_sections.content_html:
Converting Between Polar & Rectangular

Polar → Rectangular

x = r cos θ, y = r sin θ

Rectangular → Polar

r = √(x² + y²), θ = arctan(y/x) (adjusted for quadrant).

Equation Conversion

Substitute x = r cos θ, y = r sin θ, x²+y² = r² to convert equations between systems.
